transcript.text: Hello, living in Lafayette V-Log, the 2nd of June, 2013.
Yesterday I worked all day long fixing links on the pre-history page.
And then I went and finished up the day making it so that the title of the page,
You click on it, it takes you to the home page.
And as I was doing that, I noticed that I didn't ever standardize any of the CSS
On the vertical part of the timeline, even though there's not that much on the other pages
Other than North Europe 1,500 to 2,000.
That's what I'll do, I think, today.
But I also noticed I didn't do the meta tags for a lot of the pages in the AD section or CE section.
So, that's what I'm doing now.
I was working until like 3 or 4 or something.
And then...
Last night I rented The Hobbit.
That was good.
I liked it.
I liked that fantasy stuff.
That would be cool to watch a movie in 3D on a computer.
One of those kinds of movies.
Although I think it was stupid of those dwarves to...
If they're hiding from orcs, why the hell would they make a big fire on the top of the mountain
In the middle of orc territory?
That's how they found them.
It's like, just don't make the fire.
Anyways.
So, then I watched the movie.
It was really long.
It was like two and a half hours.
So, I saw like an hour and then I crashed.
And then when I woke up, I saw the rest of the movie.
I slept a little bit more.
And then I started working.
It's like 2.55 now.
So, yeah.
That's what I'm doing.
Just meta tags.
I was watching TYT interviews.
They interview a lot of politicians and stuff explaining correction politics.
It's pretty good.
But I think I'll listen to some more of the Gaelic Wars.
I still don't have it all figured out.
I'm going to have that all figured out.
Like if it's one book, I'm going to have it all figured out.
It's that one.
I'm going to listen to it and look at the Google Maps at the same time.
And then I can make a good video about it.
I'm going to have to concentrate on it.
So, yeah.
I still have internet.
The neighbors were supposed to lose the internet at the end of last month.
So, as soon as the internet goes away, I'm going to go talk to the other neighbor.
See if I can share the internet with them.
Yeah.
So, that's what we'll do today.
So, let's see.
I wonder if I'll finish the CSS today or not.
Hmm.
